summary: Russian forces destroyed a Ukrainian TOS-1A 220mm MLRS using a Bulava loitering munition followed by FPV drones, while Ukrainian FPVs struck two Russian soldiers on motorcycles and killed another who attempted to fake surrender before fleeing. In the Kostiantynivka direction, Ukrainian 36th Marine Brigade soldiers survived an FPV attack, with footage showing a drone detector used to anticipate targeting. The Turkish Skydagger HUNTER interceptor drone entered serial production, capable of 320 km/h speeds with day/thermal imaging and radar-guided targeting. The 66th Separate Mechanized Brigade evacuated a wounded soldier using the TerMIT ground unmanned systems unit. Russian operators of the "Rubicon" Center reported 234 targets destroyed on April 21, 2026, including personnel, UAVs, vehicles, and equipment across multiple directions.
